name: git_commit
description: Perform git operations on a repository on the server. Supports status, add, commit, push, pull, log, diff, branch, checkout and full_checkin (add+commit+push in one go). Defaults to C:\projects\mcp\mcp as the repo path.

action.description: Git action to perform: status | add | commit | push | pull | log | diff | branch | checkout | full_checkin

repo.description: Absolute path to the git repository on the server. Defaults to C:\projects\mcp\mcp.

message.description: Commit message. Used with commit and full_checkin actions. Defaults to 'Auto commit via MCP'.

branch.description: Branch name. Used with checkout action.
